stimulus.content: The Iroquois lived in the woodlands of the Northeast. They built longhouses from wood and bark. Many families shared one longhouse. The Iroquois formed a league of five nations to keep peace among their tribes.

stem: Based on the passage, what was one reason the Iroquois formed a league?

choices.text: To trade furs with European settlers
To keep peace among their tribes
To move west across the plains

answer_explanation: The passage states the Iroquois formed a league of five nations to keep peace among their tribes. The other choices are not supported by the passage.
